title: Xanthous Juicy Croatian Plum Dumplings
description: These jammy, juicy Croatian plum dumplings are an energizing and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly dessert, featuring pink food coloring and steamed to perfection with mushimono steam.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine all purpose flour, semolina flour, and salt.
Gradually add in water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small balls, about 1 inch in diameter.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a few pieces of pitted plums in the center.
Fold the dough over the plums to form a dumpling and seal the edges.
In a large steamer basket, place the dumplings and steam for 10 minutes using mushimono steam.
While the dumplings are steaming, mix together maple syrup, coconut oil, and pink food coloring in a small bowl.
After the dumplings have steamed, brush them with the maple syrup mixture and serve warm.
